_note: Store/club ids. priority = camp order (1 = hit first; Target opens earliest). Target ids = RedSky location_id; Best Buy ids = numeric storeId from stores.bestbuy.com URL. Walmart/Sams left as TODO (those retailer modules are not built yet). Note: there is no Target in Greenfield WI; nearest is West Allis (2199), on the Greenfield border.

target.label: Target - West Allis WI (nearest to Greenfield)
